_comment: Hand layer for the opencode-go gateway, rebuilt 2026-06-16. Everything models.dev knows about these models (context_window, max_output_tokens, modalities, family, reasoning) is pulled into the generated opencode-go.json at refresh, so this file carries ONLY what neither the endpoint nor models.dev provides: (1) the per-model wire protocol (metadata.opencode_go.protocol: anthropic|openai) that routes the adapter — a vBot-internal fact, and (2) for hy3-preview, a canonical pointer to tencent/hy3-preview because the opencode-go models.dev section carries no limit block for it (the canonical base fills context_window/max_output_tokens at load). No hand-guessed numbers.
